title: Unrooted
description: Combining technology & industrialization with exploration and adventure. Unroot from your comfort zones with this modpack
body:
# Unrooted
Ever feel like Minecraft's worlds lack in history? Are you needing a brand new adventure? Uproot yourself from the normal exploration modpacks and experience a new type of adventure!

In Unrooted, the Minecraft world is hit by realism (sort of). With continents and large mountains, crevasses, and more, it may feel a bit bigger, or even livelier with all new structures! That's when it's time to build a ship or even a biplane to navigate the seas or peaks. Once you've made your home, it's time to start Industrialization, using the Create mod and a few other features to enhance the crafting (while adding some new machines for all archeological and transportational needs)

> ## Industrialization & Transportation
> > Immersive Aircraft and Small Ships take both means of transport whether it be by air or water and turns it up to 11. You'll be able to traverse the map, find loot, store extra inventory with a number of new inventions such as the Gyrodyne, Biplanes, Cogs, Galleys, and more ways to travel around the map with its new generation and other landscapes such as the End and Nether (if you're a risktaker)
> ## Create + Expansions
> > Create is one of the main technological mods as of right now with multiple expansions such as: Crafts & Additions, Enchantment Industry, Slice & Dice, Steam 'n' Rails, as well as some Create Structures spawning around the map for an early start :)
> ## Structures & Ruins
> > Better monuments with YUNG's mods like desert temples, ocean monuments, and other neat things like witch huts and bridges, as well as other structure mods to liven up your Minecraft world instead of a desolate garden of eden to mine out
> ## It Ain't Much...
> > I know some people just like to sit and make their farms look cute and get a whole sort of foods cooked to keep the whole team comforted and happy so I've added Farmer's Delight, Expanded Delight, and End Delight! Get cookin' chefs.
> ## *Quality*  Mods
> > Veinminer, Falling Tree, Carry On, Essential, Controlling, Gravestones and some other quality of life mods fit for an easier Minecraft experience instead of repetition.
> ## Expanded Storage
> > With Iron Chests: Restocked adding tiered chests and barrels, Better Furnaces Reforged adding tiered Furnaces, this will surely help with storing mass amounts of loot!
